To,

2nd Floor, New Trading Ring, 
P.J. Towers, Dalal Street, 
Mumbai – 400 001. 
To, 
National Stock Exchange of India Limited 
(“NSE”), 
“Exchange Plaza”, 5th Floor, 
Plot No. C/1, G Block,  
Bandra- Kurla Complex Bandra (East), 
Mumbai – 400 051.

NSE Symbol: CROMPTON 
ISIN: INE299U01018 
ISIN: INE299U01018 
Our Reference: 104/2022-23 
Our Reference: 104/2022-23 
 
Dear Sir/Madam, 
 
Sub: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure 
Requirements) Regulations, 2015 – Audio recording of Earnings Call 
 
With reference to the captioned subject and our earlier letter dated October 21, 2022 informing 
about the earning call held on October 27, 2022, we hereby confirm that the audio recording 
of Q2 FY23 Earnings Call held on Thursday, October 27, 2022 has been uploaded on the 
website 
on 
the 
same 
day 
and 
is 
available 
at 
the 
following 
link 
https://www.crompton.co.in/investors/stock-exchange-filings/. 
 
This is for your information, and you are requested to bring this to the notice of your 
constituents. 
 
Thanking you, 
 
For Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Limited 
 
 
 
Kaleeswaran Arunachalam 
Chief Financial Officer 
 
 
KALEESWARAN 
ARUNACHALAM
Digitally signed by 
KALEESWARAN ARUNACHALAM
